summary: rc6 gate reports PASS after server/shared tests plus only four CLI hook test files, omitting most CLI tests and the documented CLI surface drift gate.
Public store switch-write mutates project write target without the command-level snapshot refresh that hooks consume; helper tests assert config only.
Doctor mutation CLI tests mock the server package, while server tests bypass the command renderer/exit-code layer; no real command+filesystem gate covers --fix/--fix-knowledge.

title: G11 metric counter invariant test still asserts rc.37 overlap instead of zero overlap
note: Project is 2.2.0-rc.5 while test comment says post-rc.38 must flip to zero overlap; current assertion keeps the forbidden metric event_type overlap green.

summary: werewolf-snapshot fixture is treated as production-shaped but pins project-local .fabric/knowledge and agents.meta instead of mounted store layout
archive-hint-copy snapshot has no matching test file and still preserves plan_context archive-copy baselines

title: Real performance p95 assertion in shared recall perf test can make the suite environment-dependent
createFabricHttpApp mutates process.env.FABRIC_PROJECT_ROOT without dispose/test restoration
config-loader tests create temp directories under process.cwd instead of os.tmpdir
